rulings.Case Title: FARID ZAZI et al VS. HUSNI AHMAD HIJAZI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT HUSNI HIJAZI, MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENY-FAILED TO SHIFT BURDEN, VACATING DEFAULT AND RELIEF FORFEITURE.THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT CLEARLY STATE RESPONSE DUE 5 DAYS. DEFENDANT WAS WARNED OF IMPOSING DEFAULT AND PROVIDED PROPOSED ANSWER FORMS.DEFENDANT PROVIDES NO EVIDENCE OF HARDSHIP.PLAINTIFF PRESENTS EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT HAS BEEN HARASSING AND TERRORIZING PLAINTIFF. (302/REW/PB)
